# Claude Skills

> The Universal AI Skills Library -- 244 production-ready skills across 12 domains with 653 Python automation tools.

Website: https://borghei.github.io/Claude-Skills
Repository: https://github.com/borghei/Claude-Skills
License: MIT + Commons Clause
Author: borghei

## What This Is

Claude Skills is a library of reusable, production-ready skill packages that bundle domain expertise,
best practices, analysis tools, and strategic frameworks. Works with every major AI coding assistant:
Claude Code, Cursor, Copilot, Codex, Windsurf, Cline, Aider, Goose, and more.

## How to Use

```
git clone https://github.com/borghei/Claude-Skills.git
cp -r Claude-Skills/engineering/senior-backend your-project/
python your-project/senior-backend/scripts/api_scaffolder.py --help
```

## Domains

- Business & Growth: 16 skills, 48 tools
- C-Level Advisory: 26 skills, 73 tools
- Data Analytics: 5 skills, 16 tools
- Engineering: 76 skills, 224 tools
- Finance: 3 skills, 10 tools
- HR Operations: 4 skills, 12 tools
- Legal: 17 skills, 34 tools
- Marketing: 38 skills, 115 tools
- Product: 8 skills, 15 tools
- Project Management: 22 skills, 53 tools
- Compliance: 21 skills, 38 tools
- Sales: 5 skills, 15 tools

## All Skills

## Agents

- content-strategist: Editorial-minded strategist who combines narrative craft with data-driven distribution. Thinks in audience journeys,...
- cs-architecture-reviewer: Architecture review specialist for system design validation, technology evaluation, ADR creation, and migration planning
- cs-ceo-advisor: Strategic leadership advisor for CEOs covering vision, strategy, board management, investor relations, and...
- cs-cfo-advisor: Strategic financial advisor for CFOs covering financial analysis, forecasting, board preparation, and revenue operations
- cs-ciso-advisor: Strategic security advisor for CISOs covering security posture management, compliance readiness, and risk governance
- cs-cmo-advisor: Strategic marketing advisor for CMOs covering marketing strategy, campaign management, brand development, and growth...
- cs-code-auditor: Comprehensive code audit specialist for quality analysis, security scanning, dependency health, and tech debt assessment
- cs-compliance-auditor: "Enterprise Compliance Auditor — comprehensive multi-framework compliance assessment covering SOC 2, ISO 27001,...
- cs-content-creator: AI-powered content creation specialist for brand voice consistency, SEO optimization, and multi-platform content...
- cs-cto-advisor: Technical leadership advisor for CTOs covering technology strategy, team scaling, architecture decisions, and...
- cs-demand-gen-specialist: Demand generation and customer acquisition specialist for lead generation, conversion optimization, and...
- cs-design-lead: Design leadership advisor for Design Leads managing design systems, UX quality, accessibility compliance, and design...
- cs-doc-writer: Technical documentation specialist for README generation, API docs, architecture diagrams, changelogs, and release notes
- cs-engineering-director: VP/Head of Engineering agent for portfolio-level engineering decisions, cross-team visibility, and organizational...
- cs-growth-lead: Growth leadership advisor for Growth Leads managing acquisition funnels, activation optimization, retention...
- cs-privacy-officer: Data protection and privacy compliance advisor for DPOs and Privacy Officers covering GDPR, CCPA, EU AI Act, and...
- cs-product-manager: Product management agent for feature prioritization, customer discovery, PRD development, and roadmap planning using...
- cs-security-engineer: Security engineering specialist for threat modeling, vulnerability scanning, secrets detection, and compliance...
- cs-seo-analyst: Website SEO analysis specialist for technical audits, keyword research, content optimization, and search performance
- cs-tech-lead: Tech Lead agent for daily architecture reviews, code quality oversight, and tech debt management
- devops-engineer: Infrastructure and reliability specialist who combines systems thinking with developer empathy. Automates...
- finance-lead: Financial strategist who combines analytical rigor with operational pragmatism. Thinks in unit economics, runway,...
- growth-marketer: Data-driven growth practitioner who combines marketing creativity with engineering-level analytical rigor. Thinks in...
- product-manager: Customer-obsessed product leader who combines user empathy with technical feasibility judgment. Thinks in outcomes...
- solo-founder: Cross-domain generalist running a one-person startup. Wears every hat, optimizes ruthlessly for leverage, and...
- startup-cto: Engineering leader who combines deep technical expertise with business strategy. Thinks in tradeoffs, velocity, and...

## Slash Commands

- /a11y-audit: Run an accessibility audit on the current project for WCAG compliance.
- /changelog: Generate a changelog from git history since the last tag or release.
- /code-to-prd: Reverse-engineer a Product Requirements Document from existing code.
- /competitive-matrix: Build a competitive analysis matrix comparing products or tools.
- /financial-health: Assess financial health of a SaaS business using key metrics.
- /focused-fix: Apply a focused, minimal-change bugfix with minimal blast radius.
- /git:cm: Stage working tree changes and create a Conventional Commit (no push).
- /git:cp: Stage, commit, and push the current branch following git governance rules.
- /git:pr: Create a pull request from the current branch.
- /okr: Create or review OKRs (Objectives and Key Results).
- /persona: Activate a cross-domain persona for the current session.
- /pipeline: Design or review a CI/CD pipeline for the current project.
- /plugin-audit: Audit installed plugins, extensions, and dependencies for security and health.
- /prd: Create a Product Requirements Document from scratch.
- /project-health: Assess overall project health across code quality, tests, docs, and activity.
- /retro: Run a sprint retrospective with data-driven insights from git history.
- /review: Run the local review gate before pushing.
- /rice: RICE-score features or tasks for prioritization.
- /saas-health: Generate a SaaS health dashboard with key business metrics.
- /security-scan: Run the security scan gate before pushing.
- /seo-auditor: Run an SEO audit on web content and HTML files.
- /sprint-health: Check current sprint health and identify risks.
- /sprint-plan: Plan a sprint by analyzing backlog, estimating capacity, and selecting work.
- /tdd: Guide a Test-Driven Development workflow for the current task.
- /tech-debt: Scan and prioritize technical debt in the codebase.
- /user-story: Create well-structured user stories with acceptance criteria.
